## AI Video Creator v1.0.5

### All-in-one Setup Hub
- **Setup Hub** panel at top of workspace — scan Python, pipeline, GPU, ffmpeg, Open-Sora
- **Apply maxed profile** links paths, enables GPU auto-run, sets local-python render (preserves your Open-Sora prefs)
- **Link Open-Sora → Director** one-click pipeline wiring
- Open-Sora **Prompt Studio** (wizard/inspire) and **Render** panels remounted

### Fixes
- Project **Reset** now clears Open-Sora settings (consistent with Director/GPU)
- Packaged desktop app bundles **sync-open-sora-catalog.cjs** for catalog sync
- Setup scan label only claims **local MP4 ready** when Python + pipeline are detected
- Apply/link helpers preserve existing Open-Sora config (preset, steps, etc.)

Installed **v1.0.4** apps should pick this up via GitHub auto-update, or download the new installer below.
